title: Paws and Celebrate Love Your Pet Day!
story: February 20 is Love Your Pet Day, when pet owners everywhere go extra crazy showing their furry, feathered, or scaly friends just how much they care! People spoil their pets with special treats, new toys, and extra cuddles. Some families take their dogs to pet-friendly restaurants or organize playdates at the park. Cat owners might buy fancy new scratching posts or catnip toys. Even hamster and fish owners join the fun by decorating tanks or cages with colorful accessories. Social media fills up with adorable pet photos and videos as everyone shares their beloved companions with the world.
activity_question: What do people commonly share on social media during Love Your Pet Day?
activity_choices: Photos and videos of their pets
activity_answer: Photos and videos of their pets
bonus_fact: Some pet stores offer free photo sessions for pets on this special day!

title: Cherry Sweet National Cherry Pie Day
story: Every February 20, pie lovers across America celebrate National Cherry Pie Day by baking, buying, and devouring this classic dessert! Bakeries display their fluffiest cherry pies in windows, while families gather in kitchens to roll out dough and mix sweet-tart cherry filling. Some people share photos of their homemade creations on social media, showing off lattice crusts and bubbling red centers. Restaurants often feature cherry pie specials, and many folks enjoy it warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream on top. It's the perfect excuse to indulge in this all-American treat!
activity_question: What do many people like to serve with their cherry pie on National Cherry Pie Day?
follow_up_question: What's your favorite type of pie, and what makes it special to you?

title: Scales and Tales: World Pangolin Day
story: February 20 is World Pangolin Day, when people around the globe celebrate the world's only scaly mammal! These amazing creatures look like walking pinecones and can roll into perfect balls when scared. On this special day, zoos host pangolin parties with educational talks and fun activities. Wildlife groups share cool pangolin photos on social media to teach everyone about these shy animals. Many people donate money to help protect pangolins from poachers who hunt them.
activity_question: What makes pangolins unique among mammals?
bonus_fact: Pangolins are the most trafficked mammals in the world!
